Week 5 is live: Week 5 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 27 April-3 May 2026 . Week 5 keeps the ATP clay run moving, but this is still a board where the best fantasy edge comes from staying patient before the bracket is official. The early angle is to map likely elite anchors, monitor workload after the previous clay stretch, and hunt for ranking-based pricing gaps that could matter once the official draw lands and the slate sharpens.

Bonus Ball board: Jannik Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, Alexander Zverev.
